titleStmt.title: SII 22.27: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 27. (A.R. No. 27 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME BASE. RĀJARĀJA I—16th YEAR, (A.D. 1000-1)

summary.p: The details of date are given as Pūraṭṭādi ba. 2, Monday, Punarvasu (A.D. 1000, Sept. 23). The tithi should be ba. 8. This registers the sale of 3/4 vēli and odd of land as tirunāmattukkāṇi to the temple of Tiruvīraṭṭānam-uḍaiya-Paramasvāmi by the sabhā of Kaḍavūr. It seems that some money was due to the palace by way of loan taken by one Bāradāyaṉ Pullaṉ Vīranārāyaṇaṉ alias Brahmaśrīrāyaṉ on behalf of a lady of the Mañjanattār-vēḷam. The amount had doubled itself into 30 poṉ in course of time, and some members of the Samarakēsari-teriñja Kaikkōḷar who were orderd to collect the debt, put severe pressure upon the sabhā of the village to do so. Brahmaśrīrāyaṉ had died in the meanwhile and the sabhā sought out a jñāti of his by name Sāmanta-Tanikar who, however, disowned any responsibility towards his cousin. The sabhā attached the debtor's property which had descended to the deceased's son Vīranārāyaṇaṉ Śivaṉ and the latters' nephew Pullan Vīranārāyaṇaṉ. Since these two could not be found, the property was taken over (?) exparte in lieu of the amount due and was sold to the temple. The inscription is damaged and left incomplete towards the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyum taṉakke Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭum kaṅka pāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamu
ṅ kaliṅkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷarūḻi Uḷ ḷellāyāṇṭum toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭey ceḻiyarai cetukoḷ śrīkovirājarājakesarivanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6vatu Ākum yāṇṭu pi
ṟaṭṭātittiṅkaḷ piṟpakkattuppakka miraṇṭuk kiḻamai tiṅkaḷ nāḷ puṇarpūcam Ituvāṇ ṭitu tiṅkaḷ Itu nāḷitu pakkam Itukiḻamai Itupoḻu titu paruvamāka Innāḷāl naṉ pakalāvaṇattuk keṭṭu
kaḻinta vilaiyāvaṇam Avāṇṭu Amparnāṭṭup paṭaieviya tiruk kaṭavūr sabhaiyom viṟṟa nilavilaiyāvaṇam mañcaṉattār veḷattup peṇṭāṭṭi konilakaṇṭikkut taḷikkaṭava pāratā
yaṉ pullaṉ viranārāyaṇanākiya brahmaśrīrāyaṉ kaittiṭṭu 1- ṉāl Iraṭṭittu vanta poṉ 3 10 taṇṭap ponta samarakesaritterinta kaikkoḷar taṇṭip poṉ koṇṭu varuka veṉṟu Irājarājamārāyar kaṭaiyiṭu varakkā
ṭṭak kaṭaiyiṭṭuppaṭi poṉ pokkuc ceykaveṉṟu Ippoṉ taṇṭa vanta samarakesaritterinta kaikkoḷaril puḷiyaṉ maturāntaka ṉuḷḷiṭṭa kaik koḷar vantu Ippoṉ pokkuc ceykaveṉṟu sabhaiyomai niri
lum veyililum Iṭṭu māvaṟu kayiṟukoṇṭu potip palakovuñ ceyyak koppaṭṭāṟṟātu Ippoṉ pokkuc ceyvatāka viṉavi Ippullaṉ viranārāyaṇa ṉākiya brahmaśrīrāyanukku ñāti sāmanta taṉikarai teṭiṉa
viṭattu ñāti cāmanta tanikar muṉpu niṉṟilāmaiyil Ippullaṉ viranārāyaṇaṉākiya brahmaśrīrāyaṉ tāṉ kaḻintu Ivaṉiṟ piṉpu Isvam Iṟukkak kaṭava Ibrahmaśrīrāyaṉ makaṉ viranārāyaṇaṉ
Āṉa civaṉum Ivaṉuṭap piṟantāṉ makaṉ pullaṉ viranārāyaṇaṉaiyum teṭiṉaviṭattu Ivarkaḷ muṉpu niṉṟilāmaiyāl Ivarkaḷ nilam catti koṭṭattuk kūttāḻic ceyyilum perppaṭum nilam paḻaṅkolāl nilam 7- mā Eḻu māvum Ivvāṭṭey tulānāyaṟu pū[ rvvapa] kṣattu dvādaciyum nāya[*ṟ]ṟukiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Irevati cey viṟṟa nilam Iraṇṭu māvum Ikkūttāḻicey nilam paḻaṅkolāl nilam mu Araimāvum paḻaṅkolāl nila
m naā nkumaā mukkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ Aṟumāvarai Araikkāṇi mun=tirikai nilamum Ākak kūttāḻiceyyillum pāluṟalumākap paḻaṅkolāl nilam Āvaṇam Iraṇṭināl nilam mukkāle mākāṇi mun=tirikaik kiḻ Aṟumāvarai A raikkāṇiyum vilaikoṇṭu kāci vaippārai maṟṟatu tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiya paramasvāmi tirunāmattāl viṟṟukkuṭuttu kāttikai nilam ḻicceykku Ellai kiḻpāṟkellai pāratāyaṉ nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai koṭṭakārakkulaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Āṉaikuḷavākkālukku kiḻakku vaṭapā
ṟkellai Āṉaikuḷavākkālukkut teṟkkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉ kellaiyuḷḷumakappaṭṭa nilam kha�- ceyyum Ivviṭattiley pāratāyaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ kuṇacilaṉ nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai pā pāratāyaṉ pullaṉ kataṭikaḷum nilattukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai pāratāyaṉ pullaṉ kataṭikaḷum nakkaṉ kuṇacilaṉum nilattukkuk kiḻakkum lattukkut teṟkku mākiṟa Innaṭuvupaṭṭa nilam paḻaṅkolā mākkāṇic ceyyumāka nilam Iupa yu māttāl ricaiyāka vanta kācu
lai pālai cuṭṭappaṭṭa nila ttukku kiḻpāṟkellai pāratāyaṉ pullaṉ viranāraṇaṉum viranārāyaṇaṉ kuṇacilaṉum puñcey nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟ kellai pāratāyaṉ pullaṉ kāṭakaṉum cokkaṉ kku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai vicainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷḷumakappaṭṭa nilam māttāl mukkāṟkācu varicaiyāl viStops here
Digital edition of SII 22.27 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
